name: AnimationProperties
summary: Contains information used by the Animation Tools to create sun, season, turntable and fly through animations.

constructors.name: AnimationProperties()
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnimationProperties class.

constructors.name: AnimationProperties(AnimationProperties)
constructors.summary: Initialize new instance of the AnimationProperties class.

params.name: source
params.doc: If not null, settings are copied from source

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

properties.name: AnimationName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the animation sequence.

properties.name: CameraPathId
properties.summary: Gets or sets the object ID of the camera path.

properties.name: CameraPoints
properties.summary: Gets or sets points of the camera path.

properties.name: CaptureMethod
properties.summary: Gets or sets the capture method of the animation which is either preview or full.

properties.name: CaptureType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the capture type of the animation.

properties.name: CurrentFrame
properties.summary: Gets or sets the current frame during animation record.

properties.name: Dates
properties.summary: Gets or sets the dates that are calculated for seasonal/one day sun animations.

properties.name: DaysBetweenFrames
properties.summary: Gets or sets the days between captured frames for seasonal sun animation.

properties.name: DisplayMode
properties.summary: Gets or sets the ID of the view display mode (wireframe, shaded...).

properties.name: EndDay
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end day for seasonal day sun animation in the range 1 to 31.

properties.name: EndHour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end hour for one day sun animation in the range 0 to 23.

properties.name: EndMinutes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end minutes for one day sun animation in the range 0 to 59.

properties.name: EndMonth
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end month for seasonal day sun animation in the range 1 to 12.

properties.name: EndSeconds
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end seconds for one day sun animation in the range 0 to 59.

properties.name: EndYear
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end year for seasonal day sun animation in the range 1800 to 2199.

properties.name: FileExtension
properties.summary: Gets or sets the file extension of the saved frames created by the animation.

properties.name: FolderName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the location for the saved frames.

properties.name: FrameCount
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of frames to be captured.

properties.name: HtmlFileName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the HTML file name.

properties.name: HtmlFullPath
properties.summary: Return HTML file path consisting of FolderName and HtmlFileName. To change this set FolderName and HtmlFileName.

properties.name: Images
properties.summary: Gets or sets the full path to the saved frames of an animation.

properties.name: Latitude
properties.summary: Gets or sets the latitude for sun animations in the range of -90 to +90.

properties.name: LightIndex
properties.summary: Internal value used while previewing animation.

properties.name: Longitude
properties.summary: Gets or sets the longitude for sun animations in the range of -180 to +180.

properties.name: MinutesBetweenFrames
properties.summary: Gets or sets the minutes between captured frames for one day sun animation.

properties.name: NorthAngle
properties.summary: Gets or sets the world angle corresponding to North in degrees. This angle is zero along the x-axis and increases anticlockwise.

properties.name: RenderFull
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to capture a frame in rendered mode.

properties.name: RenderPreview
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to capture a frame in preview rendered mode.

properties.name: StartDay
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start day for seasonal/one day sun animation in the range 1 to 31.

properties.name: StartHour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start hour for seasonal/one day sun animation in the range 0 to 23.

properties.name: StartMinutes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start minutes for seasonal/one day sun animation in the range 0 to 59.

properties.name: StartMonth
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start month for seasonal/one day sun animation in the range 1 to 12.

properties.name: StartSeconds
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start seconds for seasonal/one day sun animation in the range 0 to 59.

properties.name: StartYear
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start year for seasonal/one day sun animation in the range 1800 to 2199.

properties.name: TargetPathId
properties.summary: Gets or sets the object ID of the target path.

properties.name: TargetPoints
properties.summary: Gets or sets points of the target path.

properties.name: ViewportName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the viewport that will be captured.
